# One Hope Church

> A Bible-centered church family in Tucson, AZ. Sundays at 10:30 AM at Lawrence Primary School. Come as you are. Be known. Be loved.

One Hope Church is a non-denominational, multicultural church in Tucson serving English- and Spanish-speaking neighbors, as well as a growing Ukrainian community. Services are about an hour, casual, and rooted in plainly-taught Scripture.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Service times, location, what to expect, latest sermon, and how to plan your first visit.
